Version 0.name: A-LAMP-paper-AVA-v0 approximation
Version 0.description: VGG16 shared patch branch, deterministic/adaptive patch extraction approximation, simple layout features, binary AVA classifier, no exact object/global attribute graph, no official reproduction claim.
Version 0.expected_gpu_cost: High (due to VGG16 with 5 patches + 1 global)
Version 0.likely_benefit: Provides a strong paper-oriented baseline for AVA classification to compare against the practical A-LAMP implementation.

Version 1.name: A-LAMP-paper-AVA-v1 stronger approximation
Version 1.description: Better adaptive patch proposal, more paper-like patch selection, layout-aware branch improved, optional object detector or saliency-based patch candidates.
required_data: External Saliency Maps / Object Bounding Boxes
Version 1.likely_benefit: Closer to the true architectural intent of adaptive saliency.

Version 2.name: A-LAMP paper-faithful attempt
Version 2.description: Object/global attribute graph implemented, paper-like training protocol, official-style evaluation.
